comments.comment_body:
Hey Liam, prepare some Prussian blue for yourself! 😅 
You do not know you're already the hero to millions of people like me who seek JUSTICE FOR ZHULING! Move on and we're firmly behind you and The Australian!
comments.post_body:
A property investor living in a small NSW town stands accused of being at the centre of a mysterious and deadly poisoning that has enthralled millions in China for 30 years.

Sightings of the woman known as Shiyan “Jasmine” Sun, in Port Stephens, on the northern central NSW coast, have sparked a petition for Anthony Albanese to deport her to China to face questions over the case.

Ms Sun and husband Feiyu “Ringo” Xie have built up a multimillion-dollar property portfolio in the region, but according to campaigners seeking justice for her alleged victim, she is the prime suspect in the 1994 poisoning of her university roommate, Zhu Ling. This is the first time Jasmine's been pictured in 20 years.

Zhu died a month ago, turning the long-running tragedy into a potential homicide investigation.

Full story here:
https://lnkd.in/gtWSCJzj
comments.context_summary: A property investor in NSW, Shiyan 'Jasmine' Sun, is accused of being involved in a 30-year-old poisoning case in China and a petition is calling for her deportation to face questions. The case has gained significant attention in China and is now being investigated as a potential homicide after the victim's death.

comments.comment_body: Hi Shaikot, would you like to consider one of our WSU undergraduate alumni? I was his TA and knew him for a long time. A pretty good candidate for your team! 😀
comments.post_body: I’m #hiring. Know anyone who might be interested? Please apply!
comments.context_summary: The original poster is hiring and is seeking referrals for potential candidates, with the commenter responding directly to the job posting. The commenter is likely about to share information or express interest in the opportunity.

comments.comment_body: I am sincerely grateful for what you investigated so far for justice! Many thanks Liam Mendes
